params._paymentId: The ID of the payment to claim.
The ID of the payment to release.
params._receiver: The address to release the payment to.

params._paymentId: The ID of the payment to return details for.

params._offChainSlug: The off-chain slug that identifies this payment channel.
params._owner: The address of the owner of this channel.
params._paymentTokens: The list of payment tokens supported by this channel.
params._receiver: The address of the recipient of all payments made through this channel.

params._data: Concatenation of the payer's permit signature, a memo, an off-chain reference, a boolean indicating whether to release the payment immediately, and a deadline.
params._token: The address of the ERC20 token to pay with.

params._data: Concatenation of a memo, an off-chain reference, a boolean indicating whether to release the payment immediately, and a deadline.

params.index: The index of the payment token to return.

params._paymentId: The ID of the payment to refund.
The ID of the payment to release.
The ID of the payment to revoke.

ETHER().notice: Returns the address of the native token (ETH).

claim(bytes32,uint256).notice: Claims the payment with the given payment ID and amount. Can only be called by the contract owner.

emergencyRelease(bytes32,address).notice: Emergency release of a payment. Can only be called by the team.

factory().notice: Returns the address of the factory contract.

getPayment(bytes32).notice: Returns the payment details for the given payment ID.

initialize(address[],address,address,str.notice: Initializes the payment channel with the given payment tokens, receiver, and off-chain slug.

payWithERC20(address,uint256,bytes).notice: Pays with ERC20 token. Would internally check if the token is supported before paying.

payWithNative(uint256,bytes).notice: Pays with native token (i.e. ETH). Would internally check if the token is supported before paying.

paymentIdFromOffChainReference(string).notice: Returns the payment ID for the given off-chain reference.

paymentOffChainReference(bytes32).notice: Returns the off-chain reference for the given payment ID.

paymentTokens(uint256).notice: Returns the address of the payment token at the given index.

paymentTokensLength().notice: Returns the number of payment tokens.

payments(uint256).notice: Returns the payment ID for the given index.

receiver().notice: Returns the address of the receiver.

refundPayment(bytes32).notice: Refunds the payment with the given payment ID. Can only be called by the contract owner.

releasePayment(bytes32).notice: Releases the payment with the given payment ID. Can only be called by the payer.

revokePayment(bytes32).notice: Revokes the payment with the given payment ID. Can only be called by the payer. Would fail if the payment is already released or revoked.

status().notice: Returns the status of the payment channel.
